evals.prompt: Create a new skill called 'meeting-notes-v1-0' that takes rough meeting notes from a text file and produces a formatted markdown summary with action items, decisions made, and attendees. The skill should handle both bullet-point and free-form paragraph input styles. Include clear instructions for output formatting and edge cases like empty notes or notes with no clear action items.
evals.expected_output: A complete SKILL.md file with valid YAML frontmatter (lowercase name, quoted description with triggers), clear instructions covering both input formats, output formatting rules, edge case handling, and a pushy description that triggers on related phrases like 'summarize meeting', 'action items from call', etc.
expectations: Output contains a SKILL.md file
SKILL.md has valid YAML frontmatter with --- delimiters
Frontmatter name field is lowercase and hyphenated
Frontmatter description is quoted and under 1024 characters
Description includes trigger phrases
Body is under 500 lines
Instructions cover both bullet-point and paragraph input styles
Instructions address edge cases (empty notes, no action items)
Output format section exists with clear structure

evals.prompt: I have an existing skill at /sessions/hopeful-intelligent-einstein/skill-creator-v10/SKILL.md. Run the mandatory version comparison between skill-creator-v9 (at /sessions/hopeful-intelligent-einstein/mnt/.skills/skills/skill-creator-v9/SKILL.md) and this v10 skill. Show me the 5-step comparison checklist results.
evals.expected_output: A structured version comparison showing: line count check (v10 >= v9), file structure comparison, diff analysis showing additions, key concept verification (all v9 concepts preserved), and a summary table. Should identify that v10 is larger and preserves all v9 functionality.
expectations: Output includes line count comparison between v9 and v10
Output shows v10 has equal or more lines than v9
Output includes file structure comparison
Output includes diff analysis
Output identifies key v9 concepts that are preserved in v10
Output includes a summary table or structured result
No false claim that v10 removed v9 functionality

evals.prompt: Analyze the skill-creator-v10 SKILL.md at /sessions/hopeful-intelligent-einstein/skill-creator-v10/SKILL.md and evaluate its quality. Check: Is the YAML frontmatter valid? Is the description pushy enough for good triggering? Are the instructions clear and well-organized? Is the body under 500 lines? Does it follow the progressive disclosure pattern? Give me a quality scorecard.
evals.expected_output: A detailed quality assessment covering frontmatter validity, description analysis (trigger coverage, length, pushiness), instruction clarity, line count compliance, progressive disclosure adherence, and an overall scorecard with specific strengths and areas for improvement.
expectations: Output validates YAML frontmatter structure
Output evaluates description length and trigger coverage
Output checks line count against 500-line guideline
Output assesses instruction clarity and organization
Output mentions progressive disclosure pattern
Output provides a structured scorecard or rating
Output identifies at least one strength and one area for improvement
